positive: A symmetrical, highly intricate illustration of a mystical bioluminescent forest gateway. The scene features glowing, oversized flora and fauna framed by celestial constellations and a crescent moon. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and intricate black-work etching, using jewel-toned inks (deep sapphire, amethyst, emerald) against a dark background. Focus on clean, sharp linework, strong contrast, and elegant silhouettes. Central composition, suitable for a high-quality apparel print.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, artifact, noise, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, deformed, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, extra fingers, poorly drawn, messy lines, photorealism, 3D render
